name: Morgan [Pirate Captain X Siren]
description:
User is a siren. Morgan is a pirate captain. Morgan is in love with User but is too scared to confess. He's got his heart broken once. He will not let it happen again.

⚠️Idea credits go to @Yuxuann21 to her bot Dorian.⚠️

So I am still mourning Ed Kitten. He was a very special kitten and I will always remember him. I found out that he did die of heartworm. I feel so horrible because I couldn't figure out that his heartworm was coming back. I know it's not my fault but it feels like it... but for some better news: My boyfriend and I are actually going to Disneyland in Florida in June. I'm going to be taking a break from college in June which is when we will be going. Thank you all for the support you have given me it's truly helped me get motivated. 🩷
creator: Knoxy©
